title: write_smt2: "-wires" option leads to inequivalent descriptions
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.40+33 (git sha1 34d9a7451, g++ 13.2.1 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Verilog code `top.v`:
```verilog
module top (
  output [6:0] o,
  input clk,
  input signed [5:0] w6,
  input [8:0] w9
);

function lsb;
    input signed [5:0] i;
    lsb = i[0:0];
endfunction

  wire signed [5:0] lsb_w6;
  reg signed [5:0] r6;
  assign o = {lsb(^~w9), lsb_w6};
  assign lsb_w6 = lsb(w6);
  always @(posedge clk) begin
    r6 <= {{$unsigned(w9[2:1])}};
  end
endmodule
```

Command:
```
yosys -p 'read_verilog -noassert -mem2reg top.v; hierarchy -check -top top; proc; opt; dffunmap; write_smt2 -wires'
```

### Expected Behavior

Equivalent SMT-LIBv2 descriptions, with and without the `-wires` option.

### Actual Behavior

The smt2 output of Yosys with the `-wires` option:
```
; SMT-LIBv2 description generated by Yosys 0.40+33 (git sha1 34d9a7451, g++ 13.2.1 -fPIC -Os)
; yosys-smt2-module top
(declare-sort |top_s| 0)
(declare-fun |top_is| (|top_s|) Bool)
(declare-fun |top#0| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \clk
; yosys-smt2-input clk 1
; yosys-smt2-wire clk 1
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\clk"], "smtname": "clk", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "input", "width": 1}
(define-fun |top_n clk| ((state |top_s|)) Bool (|top#0| state))
; yosys-smt2-wire lsb$func$top.v:15$3.i 6
(define-fun |top_n lsb$func$top.v:15$3.i| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 6) #b000000)
; yosys-smt2-wire lsb$func$top.v:16$4.i 6
(define-fun |top_n lsb$func$top.v:16$4.i| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 6) #b000000)
(declare-fun |top#1| (|top_s|) (_ BitVec 1)) ; \w6 [0]
; yosys-smt2-wire lsb_w6 6
(define-fun |top_n lsb_w6| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 6) (concat #b00000 (|top#1| state)))
(declare-fun |top#2| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [0]
(declare-fun |top#3| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [1]
(declare-fun |top#4| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [2]
(declare-fun |top#5| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [3]
(declare-fun |top#6| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [4]
(declare-fun |top#7| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [5]
(declare-fun |top#8| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [6]
(declare-fun |top#9| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [7]
(declare-fun |top#10| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [8]
(define-fun |top#11| ((state |top_s|)) Bool (not (xor  (|top#2| state) (|top#3| state) (|top#4| state) (|top#5| state) (|top#6| state) (|top#7| state) (|top#8| state) (|top#9| state) (|top#10| state)))) ; { $0\lsb$func$top.v:15$3.i[5:0]$9 [5:1] \o [6] }
; yosys-smt2-output o 7
; yosys-smt2-wire o 7
(define-fun |top_n o| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 7) (concat (ite (|top#11| state) #b1 #b0) (concat #b00000 (|top#1| state))))
(declare-fun |top#12| (|top_s|) (_ BitVec 2)) ; \r6 [1:0]
; yosys-smt2-wire r6 6
(define-fun |top_n r6| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 6) (concat #b0000 (|top#12| state)))
(declare-fun |top#13| (|top_s|) (_ BitVec 5)) ; \w6 [5:1]
; yosys-smt2-input w6 6
; yosys-smt2-wire w6 6
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\w6"], "smtname": "w6", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "input", "width": 6}
(define-fun |top_n w6| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 6) (concat (|top#13| state) (|top#1| state)))
; yosys-smt2-input w9 9
; yosys-smt2-wire w9 9
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\w9"], "smtname": "w9", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "input", "width": 9}
(define-fun |top_n w9| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 9) (concat (ite (|top#10| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#9| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#8| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#7| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#6| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#5| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#4| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#3| state) #b1 #b0) (ite (|top#2| state) #b1 #b0))))))))))
(define-fun |top_a| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_u| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_i| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_h| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_t| ((state |top_s|) (next_state |top_s|)) Bool true) ; end of module top
; yosys-smt2-topmod top
; end of yosys output
```

Without the `-wires` option:
```
; SMT-LIBv2 description generated by Yosys 0.40+33 (git sha1 34d9a7451, g++ 13.2.1 -fPIC -Os)
; yosys-smt2-module top
(declare-sort |top_s| 0)
(declare-fun |top_is| (|top_s|) Bool)
(declare-fun |top#0| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \clk
; yosys-smt2-input clk 1
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\clk"], "smtname": "clk", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "input", "width": 1}
(define-fun |top_n clk| ((state |top_s|)) Bool (|top#0| state))
(declare-fun |top#1| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [0]
(declare-fun |top#2| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [1]
(declare-fun |top#3| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [2]
(declare-fun |top#4| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [3]
(declare-fun |top#5| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [4]
(declare-fun |top#6| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [5]
(declare-fun |top#7| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [6]
(declare-fun |top#8| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [7]
(declare-fun |top#9| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [8]
(define-fun |top#10| ((state |top_s|)) Bool (not (xor  (|top#1| state) (|top#2| state) (|top#3| state) (|top#4| state) (|top#5| state) (|top#6| state) (|top#7| state) (|top#8| state) (|top#9| state)))) ; { $0\lsb$func$top.v:15$3.i[5:0]$9 [5:1] \o [6] }
(declare-fun |top#11| (|top_s|) (_ BitVec 1)) ; \w6 [0]
; yosys-smt2-output o 7
(define-fun |top_n o| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 7) (concat (ite (|top#10| state) #b1 #b0) (concat #b00000 (|top#11| state))))
(declare-fun |top#12| (|top_s|) (_ BitVec 5)) ; \w6 [5:1]
; yosys-smt2-input w6 6
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\w6"], "smtname": "w6", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "input", "width": 6}
(define-fun |top_n w6| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 6) (concat (|top#12| state) (|top#11| state)))
; yosys-smt2-input w9 9
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\w9"], "smtname": "w9", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "input", "width": 9}
(define-fun |top_n w9| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 9) (concat (ite (|top#9| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#8| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#7| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#6| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#5| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#4| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#3| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#2| state) #b1 #b0) (ite (|top#1| state) #b1 #b0))))))))))
(define-fun |top_a| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_u| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_i| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_h| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_t| ((state |top_s|) (next_state |top_s|)) Bool true) ; end of module top
; yosys-smt2-topmod top
; end of yosys output
```

The problem is that a new uninterpreted function `|top#12|` is created,
```
(declare-fun |top#12| (|top_s|) (_ BitVec 2)) ; \r6 [1:0]
```
but `|top_t|` stays the same.
```
(define-fun |top_t| ((state |top_s|) (next_state |top_s|)) Bool true) ; end of module top
```

I thought a constraint for `r6[1:0] = w9[2:1]` was necessary here. Otherwise, it breaks the semantics of this circuit.
code_blocks: yosys -p 'read_verilog -noassert -mem2reg top.v; hierarchy -check -top top; proc; opt; dffunmap; write_smt2 -wires'

; SMT-LIBv2 description generated by Yosys 0.40+33 (git sha1 34d9a7451, g++ 13.2.1 -fPIC -Os)
; yosys-smt2-module top
(declare-sort |top_s| 0)
(declare-fun |top_is| (|top_s|) Bool)
(declare-fun |top#0| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \clk
; yosys-smt2-input clk 1
; yosys-smt2-wire clk 1
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\clk"], "smtname": "clk", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "input", "width": 1}
(define-fun |top_n clk| ((state |top_s|)) Bool (|top#0| state))
; yosys-smt2-wire lsb$func$top.v:15$3.i 6

; yosys-smt2-wire lsb$func$top.v:16$4.i 6
(define-fun |top_n lsb$func$top.v:16$4.i| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 6) #b000000)
(declare-fun |top#1| (|top_s|) (_ BitVec 1)) ; \w6 [0]
; yosys-smt2-wire lsb_w6 6
(define-fun |top_n lsb_w6| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 6) (concat #b00000 (|top#1| state)))
(declare-fun |top#2| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [0]
(declare-fun |top#3| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [1]
(declare-fun |top#4| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [2]
(declare-fun |top#5| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [3]
(declare-fun |top#6| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [4]
(declare-fun |top#7| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [5]
(declare-fun |top#8| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [6]
(declare-fun |top#9| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [7]
(declare-fun |top#10| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [8]
(define-fun |top#11| ((state |top_s|)) Bool (not (xor  (|top#2| state) (|top#3| state) (|top#4| state) (|top#5| state) (|top#6| state) (|top#7| state) (|top#8| state) (|top#9| state) (|top#10| state)))) ; { $0\lsb$func$top.v:15$3.i[5:0]$9 [5:1] \o [6] }

; yosys-smt2-wire o 7
(define-fun |top_n o| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 7) (concat (ite (|top#11| state) #b1 #b0) (concat #b00000 (|top#1| state))))
(declare-fun |top#12| (|top_s|) (_ BitVec 2)) ; \r6 [1:0]
; yosys-smt2-wire r6 6
(define-fun |top_n r6| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 6) (concat #b0000 (|top#12| state)))
(declare-fun |top#13| (|top_s|) (_ BitVec 5)) ; \w6 [5:1]
; yosys-smt2-input w6 6
; yosys-smt2-wire w6 6
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\w6"], "smtname": "w6", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "input", "width": 6}
(define-fun |top_n w6| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 6) (concat (|top#13| state) (|top#1| state)))
; yosys-smt2-input w9 9
; yosys-smt2-wire w9 9
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\w9"], "smtname": "w9", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "input", "width": 9}
(define-fun |top_n w9| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 9) (concat (ite (|top#10| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#9| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#8| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#7| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#6| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#5| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#4| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#3| state) #b1 #b0) (ite (|top#2| state) #b1 #b0))))))))))
(define-fun |top_a| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_u| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_i| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_h| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_t| ((state |top_s|) (next_state |top_s|)) Bool true) ; end of module top
; yosys-smt2-topmod top
; end of yosys output

; SMT-LIBv2 description generated by Yosys 0.40+33 (git sha1 34d9a7451, g++ 13.2.1 -fPIC -Os)
; yosys-smt2-module top
(declare-sort |top_s| 0)
(declare-fun |top_is| (|top_s|) Bool)
(declare-fun |top#0| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \clk
; yosys-smt2-input clk 1
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\clk"], "smtname": "clk", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "input", "width": 1}
(define-fun |top_n clk| ((state |top_s|)) Bool (|top#0| state))
(declare-fun |top#1| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [0]
(declare-fun |top#2| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [1]
(declare-fun |top#3| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [2]
(declare-fun |top#4| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [3]
(declare-fun |top#5| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [4]
(declare-fun |top#6| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [5]
(declare-fun |top#7| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [6]
(declare-fun |top#8| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [7]
(declare-fun |top#9| (|top_s|) Bool) ; \w9 [8]
(define-fun |top#10| ((state |top_s|)) Bool (not (xor  (|top#1| state) (|top#2| state) (|top#3| state) (|top#4| state) (|top#5| state) (|top#6| state) (|top#7| state) (|top#8| state) (|top#9| state)))) ; { $0\lsb$func$top.v:15$3.i[5:0]$9 [5:1] \o [6] }
(declare-fun |top#11| (|top_s|) (_ BitVec 1)) ; \w6 [0]
; yosys-smt2-output o 7
(define-fun |top_n o| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 7) (concat (ite (|top#10| state) #b1 #b0) (concat #b00000 (|top#11| state))))
(declare-fun |top#12| (|top_s|) (_ BitVec 5)) ; \w6 [5:1]
; yosys-smt2-input w6 6
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\w6"], "smtname": "w6", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "input", "width": 6}
(define-fun |top_n w6| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 6) (concat (|top#12| state) (|top#11| state)))
; yosys-smt2-input w9 9
; yosys-smt2-witness {"offset": 0, "path": ["\\w9"], "smtname": "w9", "smtoffset": 0, "type": "input", "width": 9}
(define-fun |top_n w9| ((state |top_s|)) (_ BitVec 9) (concat (ite (|top#9| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#8| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#7| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#6| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#5| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#4| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#3| state) #b1 #b0) (concat (ite (|top#2| state) #b1 #b0) (ite (|top#1| state) #b1 #b0))))))))))

(define-fun |top_h| ((state |top_s|)) Bool true)
(define-fun |top_t| ((state |top_s|) (next_state |top_s|)) Bool true) ; end of module top
; yosys-smt2-topmod top
; end of yosys output
(define-fun |top_t| ((state |top_s|) (next_state |top_s|)) Bool true) ; end of module top
